name: Saara - SOP_Workflow 5b - Generate Step Content + Sections

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, responseMimeType: 'application/json', maxOutputTokens: 8192 } }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, responseMimeType: 'application/json', maxOutputTokens: 16384 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ sop_id: $json.sop_id, section_key: $json.section_key, section_title: $json.section_title, display_order: $json.display_order, content_type: $json.content_type, content_text: $json.content_text, content_json: $json.content_json }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ status: 'completed', current_stage: 'completed', completed_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
